title: Module 3: The "Gold Coast" Market Heatmap (Investment Focus)
content:
Module 3: The "Gold Coast" Market Heatmap (Investment Focus)
* Function: Instead of generic Zillow data, this tracks "Regulatory Arbitrage."
* Visual: A map showing towns/buildings that have opted out of Good Cause (in upstate/suburbs) or have favorable tax abatements (421a expiration tracking).
* Value: Helps investors buy where the laws are friendliest.
4. Go-To-Market Strategy: "The Wedge"
How she uses this to re-launch her career and win luxury clients immediately.
Phase 1: The "Audit" (The Foot in the Door)
* The Pitch: Don't ask for a listing. Ask to audit their risk.
* Script: "I'm testing a new proprietary tool for my private clients. It scans portfolios to see which units are exposed to the new 2025 rent cap laws and which are exempt. Send me your rent roll, and I'll send you a free Risk Exposure Report."
* Result: She gets their data. She proves value. She highlights a problem (risk) that she can solve (management/listing).
Phase 2: The "Concierge" Listing Presentation
* Differentiation: Most agents bring comps and photos. She brings a Regulatory Strategy.
